name: MSI PRO Z790-A WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Intel 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E (PROZ790AWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO Z790-A WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: ATX Z790 PRO motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with DDR5 support and WiFi 6E.
